<|file_sep|>README.md
# Multilingual-Text-Classifier
This is a multilingual text classifier that can classify text into 10 categories.

## Dataset
The dataset is from [Multilingual Text Classification](https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/parulpandey/multilingual-text-classification-dataset) on Kaggle.

## Model
The model is a multilingual text classifier that can classify text into 10 categories. It is based on the [XLM-RoBERTa](https://huggingface.co/xlm-roberta-base) model.

## Usage
To use the model, you can run the following command:
```bash
python main.py
```
The model will then classify the text into 10 categories.

## Results
The model achieved an accuracy of 92.5% on the test set.

## License
This project is licensed under the MIT License.
